---
is-index: true   # prevents the chapter title from appearing twice on this page
---

<!-- HTML: render the ZHAW title page here (supervisors, imprint, etc.) -->
::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}

{{< zhaw-title-block >}}

:::

::: {.content-hidden when-format="html"}
# Abstract {.unnumbered}

{{< include chapters/_abstract-body.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

<!-- Typst: render the table of contents here (hidden in HTML, handled by sidebar) -->
::: {.content-hidden when-format="html"}

# Inhaltsverzeichnis {.unnumbered .unlisted}

{{< table-of-contents >}}

:::
